'''鈭歡-th-r-ng''' ('''kagathrengoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:cybercast|cybercast]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-th-r-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:cybercast|cybercast]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歡-th-r-ng
|-
! Lemma
| kagathrengoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thigathrengoko|thigathrengoko]] || [[word:jigathrengoko|jigathrengoko]] || [[word:shigathrengoko|shigathrengoko]] || [[word:kigathrengoko|kigathrengoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthugathrengoko|thuthugathrengoko]] || [[word:jujugathrengoko|jujugathrengoko]] || [[word:shushugathrengoko|shushugathrengoko]] || [[word:kukugathrengoko|kukugathrengoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙gathrengoko|th忙gathrengoko]] || [[word:j忙gathrengoko|j忙gathrengoko]] || [[word:sh忙gathrengoko|sh忙gathrengoko]] || [[word:k忙gathrengoko|k忙gathrengoko]]
|-

=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
